text.title: rag-eval-ab-testing Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to run an A/B test.

step.name: prep-isolated-configs
step.action: Spin up two isolated indexes + caches.

step.name: run-interleaved
step.action: For each q, fire A, fire B; record score + latency.

step.name: aggregate-and-test
step.action: Compute paired-test p-value; aggregate latency p95.

step.name: recommend
step.action: If p<0.05 AND latency within +20% → promote-b; if no signal → run-more; else keep-a.
